module:
Registry for embedding provider implementations.

This module provides a registry system for embedding providers that allows
dynamic discovery, registration, and instantiation of embedder implementations.

NOTE: This is a compatibility layer that forwards calls to the new Unified Registry
System implementation. It maintains the existing API for backward compatibility
while delegating to the new EmbeddingRegistry implementation.

EmbedderRegistry.docstring:
Registry for embedding provider implementations.
    
    This is a compatibility layer that forwards calls to the new
    EmbeddingRegistry implementation while maintaining the existing API.

register.docstring:
Register an embedder implementation.
        
        This compatibility method registers the embedder class in both
        the legacy registry and the new EmbeddingRegistry.

get_embedder_class.docstring:
Get embedder class by key.
        
        Maintains backward compatibility by checking both legacy and new registry.

create_embedder.docstring:
Create embedder from configuration with dimension synchronization.
        
        Forwards the call to the new EmbeddingRegistry implementation.
